disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prolonged early-morning back stiffness (>30 minutes) that eases with movement and worsens with rest — inflammatory back-pain pattern
trigger_question_examples: Is your back especially stiff first thing in the morning, and how long does it take to loosen up?
Does the stiffness get better when you move around, or worse when you rest?
Do you wake in the second half of the night with back pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, mornings are the worst — I'm really stiff for a good hour before it loosens off. Funny enough moving around helps, but if I sit still too long it seizes up again.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It's just sore, I haven't really noticed a pattern.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bilateral heel pain at the Achilles insertion (enthesitis)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any pain anywhere else, like your heels, hips or chest wall?
Any pain at the back of your heels where the tendon attaches?
Do your heels hurt, especially first steps in the morning?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, both my heels have been sore for a while — right at the back where the tendon joins, worst on my first steps in the morning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Insidious onset of low back discomfort over 6 months preceding tonight's acute flare, in a person under 45
trigger_question_examples: How long has your back been bothering you overall?
Did this come on suddenly or has it been building up over time?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The back's been slowly bothering me for about six months really, just niggling, and then tonight it went from bad to unbearable.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cauda equina screen NEGATIVE — bladder and bowel control intact, no saddle/groin numbness
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any trouble controlling your bladder or bowels, or any numbness around your groin or saddle area?
Any loss of feeling between your legs or when you wipe, or any accidents or trouble passing urine?
Can you still feel and control your bladder and bowels normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — I can still control my bladder and bowels fine, and there's no numbness down below or around the groin.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No radicular leg pain and no new leg weakness (screen for acute disc herniation with radiculopathy is negative on history)
trigger_question_examples: Does the pain shoot down into your legs, and is there any weakness, numbness or pins and needles in your legs or feet?
Any pain travelling below the knee, or trouble lifting your foot or feeling your legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it stays in my back — it doesn't shoot down my legs, and my legs feel normal, no weakness or numbness.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no unexplained weight loss, no drenching night sweats (screen for infective/malignant sinister back pain is negative)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, night sweats, or losing weight without trying?
Any temperatures, chills, or unexplained weight loss recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers, no night sweats, and I haven't lost any weight. I checked my temperature and it was normal.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Functional immobility with high fall risk tonight — temporarily bedbound, lives alone, hazards in the home (slippery hallway rugs), bathroom hard to reach
trigger_question_examples: How are you managing at home tonight — is anyone with you, and can you move around safely?
Are you able to get to the bathroom, and is there anything you might trip on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my own tonight and I can barely get up — getting to the bathroom is a nightmare, and there are rugs in the hallway I'm scared I'll slip on.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Paracetamol taken with no effect on the pain
trigger_question_examples: Have you tried any pain relief, and did it help?
What have you taken for the pain so far?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've taken paracetamol but it hasn't touched it at all.
